narrative:
Precinct Hanging Rock (precinct in Lawrence County) has 183 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 35.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 22.4 percentage points.
